name: @miniprogram-icons/monorepo
description: Workspace root for miniprogram-icons and its CLI packages

scripts.build:cli: pnpm --filter miniprogram-tabbar build && pnpm --filter miniprogram-icons-find build && pnpm --filter miniprogram-icons-show build
scripts.build:docs: pnpm run build:lib && pnpm -C docs build
scripts.build: pnpm run build:lib && pnpm run build:cli && pnpm run build:docs
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter miniprogram-icons clean && pnpm --filter miniprogram-tabbar clean && pnpm --filter miniprogram-icons-find clean && pnpm --filter miniprogram-icons-show clean && rm -rf docs/dist .cache
scripts.test: pnpm --filter miniprogram-icons test && pnpm --filter miniprogram-tabbar test
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter miniprogram-icons test:coverage && pnpm --filter miniprogram-tabbar test:coverage
